summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a sweet Greek Theatre show
review: The reviewer rates the performance as "sweeeeet" and calls it an excellent show, while also praising the superb SBD source and its transfer quality. The combination of a top‑notch soundboard capture with a highly enjoyable set makes this release stand out for listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: A single five‑star review praises both the musical performance and the soundboard recording, indicating a very strong show with excellent audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer highlights an excellent SBD source and a high‑quality transfer, implying clear, balanced audio.
